critic_findings.finding: Integrate-only recovery regenerated reports/prompts and dirtied a committed run branch.
critic_findings.rationale: Generation is skipped in integrate-only mode and an end-to-end temporary-repository test proves clean commit reuse through main integration.

critic_findings.finding: Capability/repair deltas did not require both changed machinery and changed tests.
critic_findings.rationale: Validator now checks both changed path classes; one-sided, missing-test, and positive dual-change controls lock the boundary.

critic_findings.finding: Repaired critic findings accepted missing or one-sided repair/test artifacts.
critic_findings.rationale: Validator requires existing typed machinery and test artifacts with changes on both sides; negative and positive controls cover each boundary.

critic_findings.finding: Unintegrated local compounding records could pollute future orientation.
critic_findings.rationale: Prior records must have a path commit ancestral to origin/main; uncommitted and committed-unpushed side-branch controls are excluded while pushed records are included.

data_dependencies: Observed option archive density can advance only on a distinct New York RTH market date.
Any strategy edge or fill-calibration claim still requires new market/quote evidence; infrastructure cannot manufacture it.
next: On the next distinct New York RTH market date, append one all-expiration TSLL observation snapshot and verify archive density advances from 1/3 to 2/3 without duplicate identical rows; no provider-backed historical simulation before 3/3.

useful_deltas.summary: Zero-input BUILD wakes now carry integrated closed-family/novelty/critic state forward, measure changed useful deltas, stop no-delta loops, validate finalizer role artifacts, and safely resume interrupted run branches.
